risks.title: Missing or invalid LLM API keys
risks.summary: Provider calls fail at runtime if .env keys are empty or wrong; errors must not leak secrets to clients.

risks.title: LLM provider outage or timeout
risks.summary: External APIs may rate-limit, time out, or return invalid structured JSON.

risks.title: Semantic cache false positive hit
risks.summary: Similar but not equivalent project briefs could return a prior estimate when cache enforce mode is on.
mitigations: Bucket includes mode and prompt versions
safe_to_cache false on degraded or guardrail outcomes

risks.title: Guardrail blocks or degrades valid estimates
risks.summary: Heuristic input/output policies may reject legitimate presales or highly technical briefs.
mitigations: Per-policy rollout env overrides (log_only vs enforce)
audit_id in API errors for support
Domain guardrail can be disabled via LLM_DOMAIN_GUARDRAIL_ENABLED

risks.title: CORS blocks browser UI
risks.summary: Web UI on Vite or nginx origin must appear in FRONTEND_ORIGINS or browser calls fail.
mitigations: Document default origins in README and .env.example
Compose sets FRONTEND_ORIGINS for common local URLs

risks.title: Architext JSON drifts from codebase
risks.summary: Architecture JSON may become stale as features land unless updated with changes.
mitigations: architext validate in CI or before merge
